title: Midnight Cabbage Crave
description: A savory Spanish dish featuring red cabbage, a touch of tandoori spices for a unique twist, perfect for midnight cravings and high-protein diets.

ingredients.name: tandoori masala powder (or any Indian spice blend for savory taste)

instructions: Wash and chop the red cabbage into small pieces. Rinse under cold water.
In a large pan, heat oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in tandoori masala powder, red chili powder, and salt. Mix well to combine spices with the cabbage pieces.
Cook for another 5 minutes on medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until most of the moisture is evaporated and the cabbage starts to soften slightly.
If using, add curry leaves at this stage and cook for an additional minute or two until the leaves wilt slightly.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves if desired. Serve hot as a side dish or on its own.
